listings.title: Apple iPhone 16 Pro 128GB Natural Titanium
listings.description: Latest Apple flagship with A18 Pro chip, ProMotion display, and titanium design.

listings.title: Apple iPhone 16 Pro Max 256GB
listings.description: Larger screen variant with extended battery life.

review_snippets: The iPhone 16 Pro is a significant upgrade. The camera system is outstanding. Battery life improved noticeably. Build quality is premium as always.
Titanium frame feels lighter and more premium. ProMotion display is buttery smooth. High price is the only downside — $999 for base storage feels steep.
Best iPhone camera yet. Photographic Styles and 5x optical zoom are game changers. Heat management much improved vs last year.
Coming from Android, ecosystem lock-in is real but hardware quality is undeniable. Price is the biggest con.
Charging speed still lags behind Android flagships. Otherwise a near-perfect device for daily use.
trend_snippets: Apple iPhone 16 Pro demand surges in Q4 2024 with record pre-order numbers. Analyst estimates peg unit sales at 80M+ for the cycle.
IDC notes iPhone 16 Pro driving Apple to 22% global smartphone market share, up from 18% prior year. Titanium design cited as key upgrade driver.
Consumer search interest for iPhone 16 Pro remains elevated into Q1 2025. Trade-in promotions from carriers extending demand.
Despite premium pricing, iPhone 16 Pro maintains strong NPS scores. Refurbished market growing 15% YoY.
Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra launch has not materially impacted iPhone 16 Pro intent metrics among existing iOS users.

listings.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 Wireless Noise Cancelling - Black
Sony WH-1000XM6 - Platinum Silver
listings.description: Premium colour variant with carrying case.

review_snippets: XM6 is a clear improvement over XM5. ANC is noticeably stronger in wind and transit. Multipoint connection finally works reliably.
Sound signature is more balanced — less bass-heavy. Comfort improved with new ear pads. 30-hour battery life excellent for travel.
Speak-to-chat works instantly with no false triggers. Call quality much improved. Carry case redesign is more compact.
Comparing to Bose QC45: Sony wins on ANC and sound quality. At $350 it is expensive but worth it for frequent travellers.
Touch controls take getting used to and are easy to accidentally trigger. Companion app occasionally buggy on Android.
trend_snippets: Premium ANC headphone market growing at 12% CAGR through 2026. Sony and Bose dominate the over-$300 segment with combined 60%+ share.
Work-from-home trends sustaining strong demand for premium noise-cancelling headphones in 2024-2025. Corporate gifting a growing channel.
Sony WH-1000XM6 launch drove category search volume up 34% in weeks following announcement. Upgrade cycle from XM4/XM5 accelerating.
Apple AirPods Max 2 expected in 2025 is primary competitive threat to Sony's premium headphone position.
Travel retail emerging as key growth channel. Airport and duty-free headphone sales up 22% YoY.

listings.title: Nike Air Max 2025 Men's Running Shoe
listings.description: Updated Air Max cushioning, breathable mesh upper.

listings.title: Nike Air Max 2025 Women's Shoe
listings.description: Women's colourway with extra arch support.

review_snippets: Air Max 2025 is the most comfortable running shoe I have owned. Updated cushioning absorbs impact noticeably better. True to size.
Breathability is excellent — no hot spots even on long runs. The colourways this year are great. Sole durability seems improved.
Great for casual wear and light jogging. Not ideal for serious marathon training — too much cushion stack for speed work.
Sizing runs slightly narrow. Recommend going half size up if you have wide feet. Otherwise outstanding comfort for all-day wear.
Heel counter is firmer this year which reduces blister risk on longer walks. Price point is reasonable for the Nike brand.
trend_snippets: Nike Air Max franchise maintains strong cultural relevance in 2025. Collaboration drops driving secondary market premiums of 2-3x retail.
Athleisure market projected to reach $662B globally by 2030. Nike Air Max positioned as crossover leader between performance and lifestyle.
Gen Z brand affinity for Air Max line remains top-tier in YouGov surveys. Social media mentions up 28% YoY following 2025 launch.
Nike DTC strategy accelerating — Air Max 2025 exclusive colourways driving SNKRS app downloads and membership growth.
Nike Air Max 2025 uses 20% recycled content, resonating with 18-34 demographic ESG preferences in purchase surveys.
